ai_overview: Yesterday's Confluence activity centered on product releases, technical automation, and strategic commercial updates across GDC Core, EVE, and BonusFinder. Key developments include the EVE v3.21.0 release notes and the launch of the PubTech Brand Carousel component, alongside detailed specifications for the BonusFinder Points Tracking System and UGC moderation flows. You are tagged in the "UX Weekly Sync May 12 2026" agenda, which you should review alongside your own "12/5 GDC Product Team - Weekly Update" regarding sign-in bounce rates and Ace Assistant alignment. Actionable commercial intel includes MGM Ontario CPA cuts and EdgeBoost's affiliate expansion on Covers.com. Finally, note the progress in "Gambling.com Test Automation," which now covers 253+ tests for the Profile Section using Playwright and Claude Code.

highlights.title: 12/5 GDC Product Team - Weekly Update
highlights.author: Mike Pett
highlights.summary: Positive reduction in sign-in/sign-up modal bounce rate since release. Record IUJ users levelling up in the past week showing engagement with the rewards programme. Plans to reactivate users and add further challenges post-World Cup. Ace Assistant alignment to site standards due shortly. Multiple positive Claude Design uses seen; second design system iteration upcoming.

highlights.title: UX Weekly Sync May 12 2026
highlights.author: Joshua Smith
highlights.summary: Weekly UX sync agenda for 12 May — Mike Pett is tagged as a participant. Items include locations/requirements for banners and UX support needs. Attendees: Joshua Smith, Chloe Christie, Shalini Kumar, Ciara Carroll, Jessica Dordevic, Miguel Migneco, Mike Pett.

highlights.title: FR2: Points Tracking System
highlights.author: Marc Garcia
highlights.summary: End-to-end specification for how Hints (Points) and Chips are earned, validated, credited, multiplied, displayed, converted at endgame, and adjusted across the BonusFinder loyalty programme. Covers the ledger model, daily caps, concurrency, validation timing, and Master-tier currency conversion. Every downstream FR (tiers, badges, rewards, redemption, leaderboards) reads from or writes to this ledger.

highlights.title: EdgeBoost & Luxon Pay — Weekly Intel 2026-05-11
highlights.author: Jamie Mulligan
highlights.summary: Covers.com now actively promoting EdgeBoost with promo code "COVERS" offering $50 deposit match — a significant upgrade from the previously-reported $25 GDC/RotoWire standard. New affiliate partners LiveScore.com (promo code "SCORE") and VegasInsider/Better Collective now also promoting EdgeBoost, widening affiliate footprint to mainstream U.S. sports media.

highlights.title: Gambling.com Test Automation — Setup, Progress & Framework Plan
highlights.author: Robin John
highlights.summary: Playwright-based automation framework built using Claude Code. End of Day 12: 253+ tests passing across 12 page templates and compliance suites. Profile section suite added — 43 tests covering all 6 authenticated profile tabs (Rewards, Profile Details, Additional Details, Marketing Preferences, Manage Password, Refer & Earn) with server-side persistence verification and password recovery flows.

pages.title: Ensure QA Preview Slot Registry
pages.author: Laszlo Kruchio
pages.summary: State store for the Ensure QA auto-deploy pipeline (ET-586). When a Jira ticket moves to QA, n8n reads this table to assign a free preview slot, updates the branch on the corresponding Forge site, deploys it, and marks the slot as busy. When the ticket moves to Pending Release, Done, or back to In Progress, n8n frees the slot and redeploys main to reset it. Managed exclusively by n8n — do not edit Status, Ticket, or Branch columns manually.

pages.title: FR2: Points Tracking System
pages.author: Marc Garcia
pages.summary: End-to-end specification for how Hints (Points) and Chips are earned, validated, credited, multiplied, displayed, converted at endgame, and adjusted across the BonusFinder loyalty programme. Covers the ledger model, daily caps, concurrency, validation timing, and Master-tier currency conversion. Every downstream FR reads from or writes to the points ledger defined here.

pages.title: UGC Moderation Flows & Points Award Timing
pages.author: Marc Garcia
pages.summary: Documents how content moderation intersects with loyalty point (XP) and chip award timing across three UGC surfaces on BonusFinder US. Forum: points and chips awarded immediately on submission. Comments and reviews: require manual admin approval before points are awarded; user sees a visual notification that their contribution is under review.

pages.title: BDC - DSU - 05/11/26
pages.author: Elijah Basore
pages.summary: Daily standup for Bookies DSU. QA/code changes: BetSyn bot commands to allow users to see all active slips, tail a parlay, and view all active SGP slips.

pages.title: AI Day 2026
pages.author: David Stokes
pages.summary: Testing Figma MCP to set up a connection between the GDC design system and AI tools such as Cursor and Claude. Evaluating output quality and effort required from Tech and Design to ensure consistency and maintenance of this flow using the existing design library.

pages.title: Pubtech Release Sprint 9
pages.author: Pernilla Hansson Soares
pages.summary: Brand Carousel Component (PB-430) released mid-sprint on 2026-05-07. Allows editors to configure up to three text fields (50-char limit, mandatory), Single Operator CTA for brand exit link and logo, mandatory brand image with optional alt text, and optional licence number field. Designed to replace multiple uses of the single-operator CTA component.
